ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER'S PETITION TO COMPEL UNINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS
DECLARATION OF NGOC TRINH RE NO WORKERS COMPENSATION CLAIM FILED BY PETITIONER TRINH, NGOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NGOC TRINH NOTICE OF PETITION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. COURT NOMINATES THREE POTENTIAL ARBITRATORS: JUDGE ALEX SALDAMANDO, JUDGE DAVID LEE, AND JUDGE MARGARET KEMP FROM THE ADR SERVICES, 50 FREMONT STREET, SUITE 2110, SAN FRANCISCO. PARTIES SHALL EACH STRIKE ONE NAME WITHIN TEN DAYS AND REMAINING PANELIST WILL HEAR THE MATTER. THE ARBITRATION WILL BE CONDUCTED WITHIN 60 DAYS OF THE APPOINTMENT OF THE ARBITRATOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PETITIONER TRINH, NGOC
REJECTION OF ARBITRATOR BY PETITIONER FILED BY PETITIONER TRINH, NGOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Order To Compel Uninsured Motorist Arbitration And To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER NGOC TRINH Notice of Petition for Order to Compel Uninsured Motorist Arbitration and to Appoint a Panel of Arbitrators. Appearances: Geraldine Armendariz, Attorney at Law, (415) 986-0873 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition granted, no opposition filed. Court nominates three potential arbitrators: Judge Alex Saldamando, Judge David Lee, and Judge Margaret Kemp from the ADR Services, 50 Fremont Street, Suite 2110, San Francisco. Parties shall each strike one name within ten days and remaining panelist will hear the matter. The arbitration will be conducted within 60 days of the appointment of the arbitrator. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
